title: Panimalare Song Lyrics In Tamil | Kaantha | Pradeep Kumar | Jhanu Chanthar

sections.intro: Immerse yourself in the vintage romance of Panimalare, the standout melody from the period drama Kaantha. Composed by Jhanu Chanthar and rendered by the magical Pradeep Kumar and Priyanka NK, this song captures a nostalgic '70s vibe. The poetic depth of Kutti Revathi's lyrics beautifully mirrors the timeless love story of Dulquer Salmaan and Bhagyashri Borse.
sections.easterEgg:
Hidden Details You Missed! 🕵️‍♂️

  • Detail 1: The musical arrangement features live cello and violin sections performed by Francis and Rithu Vysakh, intentionally mixed to evoke the warm analog sound of 1970s Tamil cinema recordings.
  • Detail 2: This song marks the first major collaboration between music director Jhanu Chanthar and Pradeep Kumar, designed to pay homage to the 'Ilaiyaraaja era' melodies as requested by director Selvamani Selvaraj.
  • Detail 3: The film *Kaantha* is set in 1950s Madras, and the lyrics 'Valarpiraye' (Waxing Moon) are a subtle nod to the classical Tamil literature tropes used by the 'First Superstar' character Dulquer plays in the movie.
sections.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of Panimalare?

The song is sung by the popular playback singers Pradeep Kumar and Priyanka NK.

What is the significance of the movie Kaantha?

Kaantha is a period drama set in the 1950s, co-produced by Dulquer Salmaan and Rana Daggubati, revolving around the life of a superstar in the Madras film industry.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Panimalare?

The song conveys a sense of romance and tranquility, celebrating the beauty of love and nature.

What is the plot context of Kaantha related to this song?

This song plays a significant role in highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters in Kaantha.

Who are the singers and music director of Panimalare?

The song is sung by Pradeep Kumar and Priyanka NK, with music composed by Jhanu Chanthar.

When was Panimalare released?

The song was released on January 28, 2026.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Panimalare, the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create a romantic atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. The song captures the essence of love, portraying a serene connection between the characters in Kaantha. As the singers weave their voices together, they evoke emotions of joy and tranquility, making it a perfect choice for weddings and romantic occasions. This enchanting duet is sure to leave a lasting impression on anyone who experiences it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Panimalare is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and tranquility, showcasing the enchanting voices of Pradeep Kumar and Priyanka NK. With Kaantha as its backdrop, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics by Kutti Revathi and soothing melodies composed by Jhanu Chanthar. Dive into this musical journey that promises to evoke deep emotions and create lasting memories.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, gentle one, the coolness you bring is like a new rain. Hey, the growth you bring starts with a new rain.
You are the one who gives joy to everyone. You stand in silence, without any noise.
Hey, gentle one, the coolness you bring is like a new rain. Hey, the growth you bring starts with a new rain.
Don't speak, just cool down. Don't speak, just cool down. Don't let the flowers wilt.
For this, I am humble. You and I are one. You and I are one, one, one. Come, come, come, come, come, come, come, come.
You are the one who gives joy to everyone. You stand in silence, without any noise.
